languages.text: "Конечно, сержант. Не намерена и далее испытывать терпение Иждрига. Ваша Светлость, ждем вас с триумфом в Клети".
"Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, сержант. Не намерена и далее испытывать терпение Иждрига. Ваша Светлость, ждем вас с триумфом в Клети".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."
"Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."
"Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to Tsar-Cage."
"Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."
"Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

languages.text: 「もちろん、軍曹。イズドリーグの忍耐を試すつもりはありません。貴方様、我々はツァー・ケージへの貴方の凱旋を待ちます」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to Tsar-Cage."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、軍曹。イズドリーグの忍耐を試すつもりはありません。貴方様、我々はツァー・ケージへの貴方の凱旋を待ちます。」

languages.text: "Elbette Çavuşum. İzdrig'in sabrını daha fazla zorlamaya niyetim yok. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Kafes'e muzaffer dönüşünüzü bekleyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Çavuşum. İzdrig'in sabrını daha fazla zorlamaya niyetim yok. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Kafes'e muzaffer dönüşünüzü bekleyeceğiz."

languages.text: «Claro, sargento. No quiero seguir poniendo a prueba la paciencia de Izdrig. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esperaremos su regreso triunfal a la Jaula».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

traits.locale_text: «Claro, sargento. No quiero seguir poniendo a prueba la paciencia de Izdrig. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, esperaremos su regreso triunfal a la Jaula».

languages.text: “没问题，军士。我也不打算再试探伊兹德里格的耐心了。大人，我们在牢笼恭候您凯旋。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

traits.locale_text: “没问题，军士。我也不打算再试探伊兹德里格的耐心了。大人，我们在牢笼恭候您凯旋。”

languages.text: « Bien sûr, sergent. Je n'ai pas l'intention de faire attendre Izdrig plus longtemps. Votre Seigneurie, nous attendrons votre retour triomphal dans la Cage. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, sergent. Je n'ai pas l'intention de faire attendre Izdrig plus longtemps. Votre Seigneurie, nous attendrons votre retour triomphal dans la Cage. »

languages.text: "Natürlich, Sergeant. Ich habe nicht vor, Izdrigs Geduld noch länger auf die Probe zu stellen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir werden Eure triumphale Rückkehr zum Käfig erwarten."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Sergeant. Ich habe nicht vor, Izdrigs Geduld noch länger auf die Probe zu stellen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir werden Eure triumphale Rückkehr zum Käfig erwarten."
